title: phoenicoseris regia
intro: Phoenicoseris regia, also known as the Royal or Mexican Rose Sage, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Boraginaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Mexican medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The leaves and flowers of Phoenicoseris regia are rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, contributing to several health benefits such as reducing stress, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal infusions and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
